Subject: We've Received Your Request — Plus an Important Update on Your Google Profile\n\nBody: Hi Scotti, I hope you're doing well. My name is Tanvi Mittal, and I'm a Senior Growth Specialist at Zoca. I understand you've decided to cancel

cause_analysis.narrative: Scotti Skin churned on 2026-02-17 after 197 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-27 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 13 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
